appearanceLayoutSubtitle: Theme, accent color, sort order, grid/list views
serverAccountSubtitle: Server info, library scanning, credentials, log out
libraryDataSubtitle: Listening history, metadata corrections, backups, shares
soundPlaybackSubtitle: Streaming quality, download quality, player controls
resetSoundPlaybackMessage: This will reset all sound and playback settings to their defaults.
persistenceDegradedLoginError: Storage unavailable on this device. Login can't be saved — try restarting the app.
noOfflineTracksInQueue: No downloaded tracks in queue — playback not available offline.
onboardingSwipeBody: Swipe left or right on any song, album, or artist to access quick actions like adding to playlists, downloading, or deleting. Long press for more options.
onboardingOfflineBody: Tap the Offline chip in the filter bar to switch to offline mode. Only your downloaded music will be shown — perfect for when you’re on the go without a connection.
onboardingCustomiseBody: Head to Settings to choose your streaming and download quality, set storage limits, and pick your preferred theme and accent colour.
onboardingBackgroundBody: If music stops when the screen turns off or you switch apps, open Settings → Sound & Playback and allow the app to ignore battery optimization.
helpWelcomeGuideSubtitle: Learn about gestures, offline mode, and settings
diagnosticLoggingHint: Logs audio playback events to a file for debugging.
remoteControlLoggingHint: Logs notification, lock-screen, and Bluetooth media-button events. Enable this if external playback controls aren't responding, reproduce the issue, then tap Share to send the log to support.
imageCacheLoggingHint: Logs cover-art fetch, cache hit/miss, and retry events. Enable this if covers are missing or stuck on the placeholder, reproduce the issue, then tap Share to send the log to support.
serverAddressFailoverHint: Use a different address at home and away? Add a secondary, then switch between them anytime in Connectivity settings.
secondaryServerUrlEditPrompt: Optional fallback address for the same server (for example a public domain name when you're away from your home network). Test the URL with your current credentials before saving. Used by the Server Failover feature in Connectivity settings.
serverFailoverEmptyExplain: If you reach your server through a different address when away from home — for example a LAN IP at home and a public domain name when out — add that address as a secondary server URL. Substreamer will switch over automatically when one address becomes unreachable.
serverFailoverEmptySameServerNote: Note: the secondary is for the same server through a different network path, not a different server.
failoverAutoExplain: Substreamer uses your primary URL when reachable and falls back to the secondary when it isn't. Switches back automatically when the primary recovers.
failoverManualExplain: Switch between primary and secondary manually. The app never switches on its own.
serverUrlEditPrompt: Change the address of your music server (for example if its IP address has changed). Test the new URL first — it has to respond as a valid Subsonic server before you can save. Saving will stop playback and clear the current play queue.
serverUrlChangeWarning: This will stop playback and clear the current play queue. Continue?
newPasswordMustDiffer: New password must be different from the current password.
passwordChangedMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.
failedToChangePassword: Failed to change password. The server may not support this feature.
noServerInfoAvailable: No server information available. Log in to see details.
fullScanConfirmMessage: Full scans re-read all files and may take a long time. Continue?
scanRequiresAdminHint: Scanning requires administrator privileges on your server.
listLengthHint: Number of items fetched for dynamic lists and generated playlists
offlineListLengthTitle: Offline — some lists will update later
offlineListLengthMessage: Generated playlists will use the new length immediately. Home screen and artist top songs will need to be refreshed once you're back online.
showSkipIntervalButtonsHint: Adds forward and backward skip buttons to the player for seeking within a track.
showSleepTimerButtonHint: Adds a sleep timer button to the player controls.
remoteNextPreviousTrackSubtitle: Skip to the next or previous track
remoteSkipForwardBackwardSubtitle: Jump forward or backward by the intervals set above
remoteControlsHint: Choose which controls appear on the lock screen and Control Center.
artistPlayModeDescription: Controls whether play and shuffle on artist pages use top songs or all songs from all albums.
customFormatHelp: Enter the exact format string your server expects. For Gonic, this is a profile name like {{example}}. For most other servers, use the codec name ({{codecs}}).
formatCompatibilityWarning: MP3 and Original work on virtually any server and device. Other formats may need a transcoding profile on your server, and not all formats play on every device. Try one or two tracks before relying on a non-default format for offline downloads.
iosOpusWarningBody:
Opus on iOS only plays when your server outputs Opus inside an MP4 container. Most Subsonic servers default to Ogg, which Apple's player cannot decode.

Test with a single track before relying on this for offline downloads.
offlineModeHint: When enabled, only downloaded content is available. Searches are performed locally against cached content.
showInFilterBarHint: Display the offline mode toggle in the filter bar for quick access.
autoOfflineHint: Automatically switch between online and offline mode based on your network connection.
wifiOnlyHint: Go offline when not connected to WiFi.
homeWifiHint: Go offline when not connected to a specific home WiFi network. Network names are case-sensitive.
locationPermissionHintIos: To detect which WiFi network you're on, Substreamer needs location access. When prompted, choose "Allow While Using the App" so the app can check your network each time it opens. Choosing "Allow Once" means you'd need to grant permission again every time.
locationPermissionHintAndroid: To detect which WiFi network you're on, Substreamer needs location access. When prompted, choose "While using the app" so the app can check your network each time it opens. Choosing "Only this time" means you'd need to grant permission again every time.
ssidReadFailedWithNetworksIos: Unable to read your WiFi network name. Location permission may have been revoked or set to "Allow Once". In your device Settings, make sure location access for Substreamer is set to "Allow While Using the App".
ssidReadFailedWithNetworksAndroid: Unable to read your WiFi network name. Location permission may have been revoked or set to "Only this time". In your device Settings, make sure location access for Substreamer is set to "While using the app".
ssidReadFailedNoNetworks: Permission was granted but we still can't read your WiFi network name. This feature may not work correctly on your device. You can try again later, or switch to the WiFi Only option instead which doesn't need location access.
connectToWifi: Connect to WiFi to detect your network name.
connectToWifiWithManualHint: Connect to WiFi to detect your network name. You can also add a network manually below.
verifyNameHint: Verify the name is correct, then tap Add.
batteryOptimizationRestrictedHint: Some Android devices may stop background music streaming to save battery. Tap to request an exemption.
batteryOptimizationOkHint: Background playback should not be interrupted by battery optimization.
fireBackgroundPlaybackTitle: Keep music playing in the background
fireBackgroundPlaybackBody: Fire tablets have power features that can pause or stop background audio. To keep playing with the screen off, allow the app to ignore battery optimization, and turn off "Smart Suspend" in your device Settings — it switches Wi-Fi off when the tablet is idle.
noTrustedCertificates: No trusted certificates. Self-signed certificates accepted during login will appear here.
addCertificateHint: Enter the server address to fetch its SSL certificate.
removeActiveCertificateMessage: This certificate is used to connect to your current server. Removing it may prevent the app from communicating with {{hostname}} until you re-accept the certificate.
removeTrustedCertificateMessage: Remove the trusted certificate for {{hostname}}? You will need to re-accept the certificate on next connection.
invalidUrlMessage: Please enter a valid server address.
failedToFetchCertificate: Failed to fetch certificate from server.
incompleteSetupMessage: Home WiFi mode needs location permission and at least one network name to work. Disable auto-offline?
shareUrlHint: Set an alternate URL for share links (e.g., a public domain name). Defaults to your server address.
shareUrlHintWithServer: Set an alternate URL for share links (e.g., a public domain name). Defaults to your server address ({{serverUrl}}).
sharingNotAvailableHint: Sharing may be disabled on this server or not supported by your account.
noSharesYetHint: Share an album, playlist, or queue to create one.
storageLimitWarning: You've selected {{selected}} GB but only {{available}} is available
backupDescriptionIos: Your listening history, MBID overrides, and scrobble exclusions are backed up to iCloud, as this data is only available locally.
backupDescriptionAndroid: Your listening history, MBID overrides, and scrobble exclusions are backed up to Google Backup, as this data is only available locally.
backupFailedMessage: Something went wrong while creating the backup. Please try again.
repairImagesOfflineNotice: Offline — reconnect to the server to repair incomplete images.
imageRepairCompleteWithFailures: Repair partial — {{repaired}} restored, {{removed}} removed, {{failed}} still incomplete
refreshCoversHint: Offline Music re-downloads covers only for tracks you've cached for offline playback. All re-downloads every cover art stored in this cache.
downloadFullLibraryConfirmBody: This queues all {{albums}} albums and {{playlists}} playlists for download. It can take a while and use significant storage.
downloadFullLibraryOffline: Connect to your server to download the full library.
downloadFullLibraryQueueNotEmptyBody: Please clear the download queue before downloading your full library.
downloadFullLibraryFailed: Couldn't prepare the full-library download. Check your connection and try again.
downloadFullLibraryPartial: Couldn't queue {{failed}} of {{total}} items. Try again to pick up what's missing.
clearImageCacheMessage:
This will remove {{size}} of cached images. Continue?

This may affect offline access to your music.
clearMetadataCacheMessage:
This will remove {{count}} cached items. Continue?

This may affect offline access to your music.
clearDownloadedMusicMessage:
This will remove {{size}} of downloaded music. Continue?

This will stop playback and clear the current queue, as any downloaded items in the queue would fail to play. This will also break offline access to your music.
clearAllDataMessage:
This will remove ALL offline data including downloaded music, cached cover art, and metadata.

This data is needed for offline playback and efficient online functionality. Rebuilding it requires re-downloading music and re-fetching metadata from your server.

Don't do this unless you are really sure.
concurrentDownloadsHint: Select how many tracks to download simultaneously.
concurrentImageDownloadsHint: Select how many images to download simultaneously.
restoreBackupHint: Select a backup to restore. This will replace your current data.
failedToRestoreTapToRetry: Failed to restore — tap to retry
restoreBackupConfirmMessage:
This will replace your current data with the backup from {{date}} ({{details}}).

This cannot be undone.
restoreCrossDeviceConfirmMessage: This backup was created on {{device}} on {{date}} ({{details}}). Choose how to apply it to this device.
deviceNameEditPrompt: Pick a name for this device. It appears next to backups created here so you can tell them apart on other devices.
deviceNameLocationHint: Change this device's name under Server & Account → Account.
loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Subsonic server
legacyAuthenticationHint: Required for Nextcloud Music and Ampache servers
trustServerCertificateHint: Manually trust a self-signed or custom certificate
sslCertificateRetrievalError: SSL certificate error: Could not retrieve certificate details. {{message}}
certChangedWarning: WARNING: The SSL certificate for this server has changed since you last connected. This could indicate a server reconfiguration, but could also mean someone is intercepting your connection. Only proceed if you trust this server.
certValidDescription: The server at {{hostname}} has a valid certificate signed by a trusted authority. You can add it to your trusted list to pin this specific certificate for extra security.
certUntrustedDescription: The server at {{hostname}} is presenting a certificate that is not trusted by your device. This is common for self-hosted servers using self-signed certificates. Review the details below before deciding to trust it.
recentlyAddedEmpty: New albums added to your server will appear here
recentlyPlayedEmpty: Albums you listen to will appear here
frequentlyPlayedEmpty: Your most played albums will show up here over time
randomSelectionEmpty: Add some albums to your library to get started
noDownloadedMusicHintAfter: button on an album, playlist, or your favorite songs list to download it for offline listening
listenToSeeStats: Listen to some music to see your stats here
artistsNotAvailableOffline: Artists are not available in offline mode
downloadFavoriteSongsOffline: Download your favorite songs to access them in offline mode
starSongsHint: Star songs you love and they will appear here, or check your filters
starAlbumsHint: Star albums you love and they will appear here, or check your filters
starArtistsHint: Star artists you love and they will appear here, or check your filters
findDownloadedMusic: Find songs and albums in your downloaded music
noTracksFoundSubtitle: Please check your server is online and reachable, then pull to refresh
loadAlbumError: Substreamer ran into an issue loading this album.
loadArtistError: Substreamer ran into an issue loading this artist.
noTracksPlaylistSubtitle: When you add tracks to this playlist they will appear here. If you already have tracks, check your server is reachable and pull to refresh.
loadPlaylistError: Substreamer ran into an issue loading this playlist.
noDownloadedPlaylistsSubtitle: Download playlists from your library to listen offline. They will appear here when you are in offline mode.
nothingPlayingSubtitle: It's quiet in here… pick something good and hit play!
lyricsTimedOut: Couldn't load lyrics — the server took too long to respond.
lyricsNotAvailable: No lyrics available for this track.
clearQueueMessage: This will stop playback and clear the queue.
clearDownloadQueueMessage: This will cancel all downloads and remove partially downloaded files. Continue?
noDownloadsInQueueSubtitle: Downloads you start will be tracked here
includePartialDownloadsHint: When off, the Downloaded filter shows only albums you explicitly downloaded
removeAlbumKeepsSongsTitle: Some tracks will stay on device
removeAlbumKeepsSongsMessage_one: {{count}} track from {{album}} is part of other downloads. The album will show as partially downloaded.
removeAlbumKeepsSongsMessage_other: {{count}} tracks from {{album}} are part of other downloads. The album will show as partially downloaded.
noOptionsOffline: No additional options available in offline mode
deletePlaylistConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
shareMessageQueue: Check out what I'm listening to
failedToCreateShare: Failed to create share. The server may not support sharing.
failedToSaveTapToRetry: Failed to save — tap to retry
failedToLoadSimilarArtistsMix: Failed to load similar artists mix
downloadsInProgressBody: Return to Substreamer within a few minutes to avoid download interruption.
librarySyncingInProgressBody: Substreamer is caching album details in the background.
syncErrorTap: Library sync error — tap to retry
syncLibraryDescription: Rebuilds your cached album list and every album's songs. Useful if content appears missing or out of date and pull-to-refresh hasn't fixed it.
syncLibraryOfflineNotice: Offline — reconnect to the server to sync your library.
clearAllDownloadsMessage: Delete all downloaded music? This cannot be undone.
removeDownloadMessage:
Delete "{{name}}" and free {{size}}?

This may affect offline access to your music.
redownloadMessage: Redownload all tracks in "{{name}}" with current quality settings?
downloadForOffline: Download albums or playlists for offline listening
clearImageCacheConfirmMessage: Delete all cached images? They will be re-downloaded as you browse.
deleteCachedImageMessage:
Remove all cached variants for this image?

This may affect offline access to your music.
imagesCachedAutomatically: Images are cached automatically as you browse
deleteCachedMetadataMessage:
Remove cached data for "{{name}}"?

This may affect offline access to your music.
metadataCachedAutomatically: Metadata is cached automatically as you browse
scrobblesAppearAfterPlaying: Scrobbles will appear here after tracks finish playing
pendingScrobblesSentAutomatically: Pending scrobbles are sent to your server automatically
artistOverridesAppearHere: Overrides for artists will appear here.
albumOverridesAppearHere: Overrides for albums will appear here.
emptyDirectorySubtitle: This directory contains no files or folders
migrationLogGeneratedOnLaunch: A log will be generated on the next app launch.
noListeningHistorySubtitle: Listen to some music and check back soon to see your personal stats, top tracks, and listening trends.
listeningHistoryDisclaimer: Listening history is tracked locally on this device and is not synced to your server or other devices.
waitingToBeSubmitted: Waiting to be submitted to the server
noDownloadedSongs: No songs downloaded for offline listening
songLibraryEmptyHint: Sync your library to see every song here.
albumInfoTimedOut: Couldn't load album info — the server took too long to respond.
albumDetailsNotFound: No album details available for this track.
albumDetailsCompilation: Album details aren't available for compilations.
scrobbleExclusionsSubtitle: Exclusions you set from an album, artist, or playlist menu will appear here.
tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your filters, or pull to refresh
playlistsEmptySubtitle: Playlists from your server will appear here. Pull to refresh to check for updates.
repeatOffLabel: Repeat off. Tap to repeat queue.
repeatAllLabel: Repeat queue. Tap to repeat current track.
repeatOneLabel: Repeat current track. Tap to turn off repeat.
sharingNotAvailableOnServer: Sharing is not available on this server.
variousArtistsBio:
Various Artists collects compilation albums, soundtracks, tribute records and other releases that feature songs from multiple artists.

Browse the albums below to discover what's in your collection.
randomSelectionFromLibrary: A random selection from your library
randomSongsAcrossDecades: Random songs from across the decades
completelyRandomMix: A completely random mix from your library
crossoverOfTopGenres: A crossover of your top genres
noBookmarksSubtitle: Save your spot from the player to pick up a queue right where you left off.
